title: Comment from Health Level Seven (HL7) International , HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: Please see attached the comments of Health Level Seven (HL7) International on the Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions to Unleash Prosperity Proposed Rule  (HTI-5). We appreciate the opportunity to provide feedback.
